15043446.title: Nicholas White (lawyer)

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Irish lawyer, judge, privy councillor and government official

15043446.description: Irish lawyer, judge, privy councillor and government official
15043446.extract: Sir Nicholas White (c.1532 – 1592) (or Whyte) was an Irish lawyer, judge, privy councillor and government official during the reign of Elizabeth I.
